programmes.show_description: Is í an peileadóir as Ciarraí Louise Ní Mhuircheartaigh a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (This programme focuses on Kerry Ladies Gaelic Footballer Louise Ní Mhuircheartaigh.)
Tá cúrsaí corraithe go maith sna New Democrats agus Nyborg ag dul i muinín an lámh láidir. (Tensions rise in the New Democrats party as Nyborg uses hard-handed tactics.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Caitheann Denis Kirwan súil chun cinn ar Fhéile Rásaíocht Seilge Náisiúnta Cheltenham 2026. (Denis Kirwan looks ahead to the 2026 Cheltenham National Hunt Racing Festival.)
Buaicphointí CLG ó Shraitheanna Allianz agus ó chluichí liathróid láimhe. (GAA highlights including Allianz League and handball action.)
Corey Hanna, múinteoir as Doire, a bhfuil dhá sheomra lán le héadaí aici a bheidh linn inniu. (This week we meet Corey Hanna from Derry who has two rooms full of clothes at home.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Bréidín ag iarraidh pictiúr de Chlúmh a phéinteáil ach an mbeidh sé in é a choinneáil socair? (Tweedy sets out to paint a portrait of Fluff.)
Beidh na Singalings ag dul ar thraein inniu! (The Singalings are riding on a train today!)
Teach Spraoi a dhathóidh na Dathanna inniu. (Today, the Colours have fun as they Colour in a Playhouse.)
Téann Cory agus Freddie in iomaíocht le Deartháireacha na Cráige i gcomórtas damhsa. (Cory and Freddie take on the Clutch Brothers in a dance competition.)
Tá maighnéad nua ag an Uasal Easóige agus tá na Meicneoirí an-tógtha leis. (Mr. Weasel has a new magnet, and all the Mechanics are very impressed.)
Is maith le Abby agus le Rudy nithe a athchúrsáil mar go bhfuil sé go maith don timpeallacht. (Abby and Rudy are showing kindness to the earth by recycling.)
Tá Posy ag iarraidh go ndéanfadh sí féin agus Pip portráidí dá chéile sna pancóga. (Pip and Posy are decorating pancakes & Posy suggests they create pancake portraits.)
Is breá leis na hOlobobanna a bheith ag ligean orthu féin gur foghlaithe mara iad. (Playing pirates is fun, especially with the help of Ladybaard and some Goldy Glitter Fruit!)
Caithfidh Gekko misneach a bheith aige chun Owlette agus Catboy a tharrtháil. (Gekko has to overcome his fears and rescue Catboy and Owlette.)
Cruthaíonn Wussywat agus a cairde píosa ealaíne le péint. (Wussywat and her friends experiment with paint.)
Feiceann Zou agus Daideo loirg coise sa sneachta agus socraíonn siad na loirg a leanúint in éineacht le Elzee. (Zou and Grandpa see footprints in the snow today.)
Bíonn ag eirí go maith le Tyra agus a cuid físeáin go dtí go gcuireann a lucht leanúna suim i nduine éigin eile. (Tyra is doing really well with her online videos.)
Tá fiacail scoilte ag Wasabi agus tá Ginger ag iarraidh cabhrú leis. (Wasabi cracks his tooth, so Ginger comes up with some creative but unsuccessful ways to extract it.)
Tá Dot ag iarraidh cárta poist speisialta a sheoladh chuig a Mamó. (Dot wants to send her Nana a special post card.)
Tá leantóir nua ag Ella & tá sí ag iarraidh go rachaidh na gasúir ag spraoi leis i nGairdín na Gréine. (Ella has a new trailer and wants all the children to come and play with it.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Níl tada le déanamh ag Charlie agus Lola ó tharla go bhfuil sé ag cur báistí. (It's raining outside, and Charlie and Lola have nothing to do.)
Tugann Pinocchio agus Buaiceasaín muisiriún don Chailleach a dhéanann go hálainn í. (Pinocchio and Buaiceasaín give a mushroom to Cailleach that makes her adorable.)
Buann Lola bonn i gcomórtas scipeála ach goideann na Guanos é. (Lola wins a medal that grabs the attention of the Guanos, who steal it.)
Taispeánann Angelo scannán scanrúil do Pheadar. (Angelo makes the mistake of showing Peter a monster movie.)
Tá Máirtín ag ceapadh go bhfuil sé go dona ag chuile shórt agus socraíonn Dónall cúnamh a thabhairt dó. (Ralph feels he isn't very good at anything so Henry tries to help him.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi rothaí an bhus a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the wheels on the bus.)
Tugann Blocuimhir a Ceathair cuairt ar an Tír Réidh. (Four visits Flatland, where the flat shapes live, and becomes a real square.)
Is maith le Glas gach rud atá glas a fhiosrú. (Green is happy as she explores all that is Green.)
An mbeidh Gabh agus Stop in ann cabhrú le Frog an sruthán salach a thrasnú? (Can Go and Stop help Frog cross the muddy stream to get to band practice?)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag insint dúinn faoin oracs inniu. (John the zookeeper takes us on a fun-filled journey to learn about the oryx.)
Féachann Posy le cluichí éagsúla a imirt in éineacht le Pip agus le Frankie ag an am céanna. (Posy tries to play different games with Pip and Frankie at the same time!)
Is é breithlá Chicí é agus tá Rocco le cáca álainn a dhéanamh di. (It's Cicí's Birthday. Rocco makes a beautiful birthday cake for her.)
Amhrán faoi mhamó agus faoi dhaideo a bheidh le cumadh ag Gaelscoil Thaobh na Coille. (On this episode Gaelscoil Thaobh na Coille write a song about granny and granddad.)
Tá burgair nua Chef Pisghetti caillte ag George. (George accidently loses a batch of Chef Pisghetti's newest creation.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina thiománaí trucaile nuair a bheidh sé mór. (Ruarc imagines his life as a truck driver when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Stróiceann Zou agus Zak bosca rúnda a d'fhág Elzee acu le haire a thabhairt dó. (Zou and Zak rip a mystery box that Elzee leaves in their care.)
Ar chlár an lae inniu, beidh madra ag spraoi san uisce, béar bán cairdiúil agus pearóid a sciobann spéaclaí a úinéara. (On today's programme we have a dog making a splash.)
Sara Uí Chéide as Leitir Móir a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín inniu. (Sara Uí Chéide from Leitir Móir is Máirtín's guest.)
Téann Malcolm chuig an ospidéal chun a aipindic a bhaint amach. (Malcolm is hospitalized for an appendectomy.)
Níl fágtha ag Malcolm Kramer ach sé mhí ar an saol seo. (Malcolm Kramer only has six months to live.)

Is iad Emma Ní Fhíoruisce agus an banna Grooveline a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Emma Ní Fhíoruisce and Grooveline rise to the challenge.)

Caithfidh na Dathanna iad féin a eagrú ar roth mór inniu! (Today, the Colours have to organise themselves on a big wheel!)

Déantar puisín de Catboy. (Catboy gets turned into a kittycat.)
Foghlaimíonn Wussywat faoi chothromaíocht agus í ag spraoi. (Wussywat tries her hand at pogoing, hula hooping and skipping but can't stay balanced.)

Tá taisce mhistéireach curtha sa ghairdín. (There is a mysterious treasure buried in the garden.)
Tá Dot chun gach rud a dheisiú. (Dot is going to fix everything.)
